key_themes: Operational improvements and sustainability in palm oil
Strong balance sheet with net cash and low valuation
Analyst buy ratings and market outperformance
summary: M.P. Evans Group PLC (MPE.L), an Indonesian palm oil producer, reported record 2025 results with revenue rising 5% to $371m, gross profit up 22%, EPS over 160p, and a 14% dividend increase to 60p per share. The company is debt-free with $87.5m net cash, improved yields/extraction rates, expanding planted area beyond 70,000 hectares, and a positive 2026 start. The stock has delivered strong returns (≈33% YTD, 65% 1-year as of mid-April 2026), outperforming the market, with consensus analyst targets around 1,650-1,750 GBp and a Buy/Strong Buy rating.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/MPE.L/)[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/MPE.L/)
sources: 10+ news articles/RNS on FY2025 record results (Mar 2026), 5 relevant recent X posts (Mar-Apr 2026), Yahoo Finance (quote, performance, analysts), Company reports, presentations & investor site, LSE/ADVFN share chat references and Morningstar data
